q1.question: What exactly is GEO?
q1.answer: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimization. It's optimizing your online presence so AI tools like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity recommend your business in their answers.

q2.question: How long until I see results?
q2.answer: Initial improvements in AI visibility are often visible within 4-6 weeks. We build sustainable results over 3-6 months.

q3.question: Does GEO work for small businesses?
q3.answer: Absolutely. Smaller businesses can especially benefit from the first-mover advantage. AI tools look for authority and relevance, not necessarily company size.

q4.question: What does a GEO project cost?
q4.answer: Our projects start from 1,500 euros per month. The exact investment depends on your current situation, goals, and scope.

q5.question: Can I combine GEO with SEO?
q5.answer: Definitely, and we recommend it. GEO and SEO complement each other. Many optimizations for AI visibility also help your traditional search results.

q6.question: How do you measure AI visibility?
q6.answer: We monitor how often and in what context your business is mentioned by various AI tools. We also track the quality of recommendations and impact on your traffic and conversions.

rick.name: Rick Warmerdam
rick.bio: As an entrepreneur and digital marketing specialist, I saw how the search world is fundamentally changing. AI assistants are becoming the new gatekeepers of information. With Warmerdam Consulting, I help businesses stay visible in this new landscape.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Preparing businesses for the future of search. We believe AI visibility will become as important in the coming years as SEO has been for the past 20 years.
